form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 29-day let-up. At the latest run ran on from midfield; 3rd of 12 at this track on March 8 over 1400m, on heavy track; 1.4 len behind Bonsai Bob with 57kg at $6.30. The race before that 4th of 14 at Ascot Park on February 14 over 1400m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Ziggy Stardust with 55kg at $16.50. Sure to be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted at the start losing ground.

Over raced in the early stages.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resumes off a 37 day letup. Resuming raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 6 len at Ascot Park February 14 over 1600m in soft going defeating Neednoman carrying 55.5kg at $3.80. Second run from a spell raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 16 at Wingatui on February 28 over 1600m, slow going 0.6 len behind The Ocean Heart carrying 56kg at $3.80. Rates highly. Big chance with a repeat of the latest effort.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crowded leaving the barriers having to be steadied, losing ground.
Raced keenly through the early and middle stages. Held up until near the 100m.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 14 at Wingatui on March 15 over 1600m, slow going 3.5 len behind Blushing with 56kg at $8.30. The run before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 9 at this track on March 8 over 1400m, on rain affected going; 2.75 len behind Ziggy Stardust with 52kg at $14.60. In a suitable race and can play a major role.

When tiring steadied away from the heels of Patraine, near the 150m.

form.formComment: Returns from a 58-day let-up. Last start 9th of 15 at Wingatui on February 7 over 1400m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Abit Sassy with 57.5kg at $7.70. The run before that faded in the straight ran last of 16 at Wingatui on January 17 over 1600m, slow going 39 len behind Aladdins Jem carrying 56.5kg at $14.10. Finds a nice race and is expected to do much better.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after 10 months won by 1.2 len at this track March 8 over 1200m in the wet defeating Turn The Tide carrying 55kg at $4.40. Previously second-up 6th of 12 at this track on April 19 over 1100m, on rain affected going; 3.5 len behind Four The Moment with 52kg at $7.20. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign fourth of 12 at this track January 1 over 1600m, 5 len behind Lined Satin with 55kg at $7.80. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.5 len Ascot Park October 3 over 1200m in the wet defeating Perfect Tycoon carrying 54.5kg at $3.10. Will take a lot from this run but stays under notice.

form.formComment: Most recently raced on the pace before fading 12th of 14 at Riccarton Park on March 21 over 1200m, 8 len behind Jetstream carrying 55kg at $26.50. The race before that 3rd of 12 at Riccarton Park on March 4 over 1000m, on a wet track; 4.5 len behind Mi Bella with 55kg at $21.80. Sure to prove hard to beat at a circuit she has enjoyed in the past.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign second last of 13 at Wingatui in the LR Otago RC Breeders Stakes December 26 over 1400m, soft track; 14 len behind Bobby Mcgee carrying 56.5kg at $103.90. Previously first up; ran last of 12 at Riccarton Park in the LR Canterbury Belle Stakes September 13 over 1200m, soft track; 11 len behind Miss Starlight with 56.5kg at $80.30. Wait and see how she comes up.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second of 11 at Wingatui March 16 2025 over 1200m, soft track; 1.0 len behind Intrepid Girl carrying 56.5kg at $20.60. First up last campaign second of 14 at Gore October 23 2024 over 1335m, in the wet; 2.5 len behind Ominous carrying 51kg at $28.30. See how she returns.
